nodes.context: Organised street gang based in Leyton and Walthamstow, East London, controlling drug trade with violence.

edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.
edges.context: Drive & Marlowe is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: The Mali Boys emerged in 2015 after it splintered off from the Beaumont Crew gang.
edges.context: Mali Boys splintered from Beaumont Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: Jaden was associated with rival gang Beaumont Crew (also known as Let's Get Rich) and was allegedly out drug dealing at the time of death.
edges.context: Mali Boys killed a member associated with Beaumont Crew, indicating rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: The Mali Boys were reported to be in a 'turf war' with a group known as Priory Court or Higham Hill.
edges.context: Mali Boys engaged in a turf war with Priory Court.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beaumont Crew / Let’s Get Rich (LGR), Priory Court (PC) / Higham Hill, CGM, Anyone Can Go (ACG), Custom House (CH), Peckwater (51st)
edges.context: CGM is listed as a rival of Mali Boys in the infobox.
